items.claim: Hoofey is a very difficult test for Topuria's comeback fight.
items.quote: Hoofey's too much of a tough fight for Topuria's comeback if you really want to see if Topuria has any return to upside.

items.claim: Topuria needs a test that allows for long-term upside after his recent loss and physical damage.
items.quote: You got a guy who just lost about lost his undefeated record, lost at a historic card, lost his placement in pound-for-pound, and got [__] physically beat up about it. If you are a promoter and you want that person to have any kind of long-term upside, you need to give him about that, you know, is some kind of a test

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett would be a significant underdog against Topuria.
items.quote: I didn't think Justin Gaethje was going to win. I don't think Paddy would win

items.claim: Max Holloway has a significant grappling disadvantage compared to Charles Oliveira.
items.quote: Oliveira had such a dominant performance against Max with the grappling

items.claim: Diego Lopes is a very good grappler.
items.quote: Diego is a very good grappler

items.claim: Hoofey would likely dominate Diego Lopes in a striking-only matchup.
items.quote: Rufi got demolished on the floor by Benoit Saint Denis, but he would probably demolish Diego on the feet.
